title: Elmorin Refabricated
description: This modpack is based around the Conquest Refabraciated mod, where we use it in combination with other mods like Believe mod to create stunning builds!
body:
Explore a vast and interesting world built by Legendary Porpoise and his community! This is a huge worldbuilding project consisting of multiple building styles and in-depth lore to bring the project to life.

From towering cities built high in mountains, to small villages nestled in valleys, you can explore and find many interesting locations that will peak the interest of Skyrim, The Witcher or simply Medieval-Era fans!

This is a modpack for Project Elmorin in order to make things easier when joining the server, it includes all the necessary mods for shaders, connected textures and to allow Conquest Reforged to be used to its fullest potential.

Social Media:

Disclaimer:
All mods featured in this pack are made by 3rd-party developers.
